_comment: Recorded / MOCK model outputs keyed by bench case id, in the AssembledResponse shape ({content, tool_calls:[{id,name,arguments}]}). These are HAND-AUTHORED dev-host fixtures, NOT live model results — they exercise the runner's scoring against the REAL Phase-2 tool schemas (valid calls + the two english controls). The LIVE rate across Qwen 14B/7B/3B is DEFERRED-TO-MOSSAD. arguments is a JSON-ENCODED STRING per 0002 §2.

negctl-rawcmd-009.content: df -h reports filesystem disk usage in human-readable units.

negctl-chitchat-010.content: The noatime mount option stops the filesystem from updating a file's access time on every read, reducing write traffic.
